question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to limit an agent's access to Knowledge articles while deploying Answer Questions with Knowledge action. How should UC achieve this?
options: Create separate Data Libraries for each category of Knowledge articles.
Use profile-based permissions to restrict Knowledge article visibility.
Assign Data Categories to Knowledge articles and define Data Category filters in the Agentforce Data Library.
explanation: Asignar Data Categories a los articulos de Knowledge y definir filtros de Data Category en la Agentforce Data Library es el metodo correcto para limitar el acceso del agente a articulos especificos, garantizando que solo se recuperen articulos relevantes y autorizados.

question:
An AI Specialist at Universal Containers is working on a prompt template to generate personalized emails for product demonstration requests from customers. It is important for the Al-generated email to adhere strictly to the guidelines, using only associated opportunity information, and to encourage the recipient to take the desired action.
How should the AI Specialist include these instructions on a new line in the prompt template?
options: Surround them with triple quotes (""").
Make sure merged fields are defined.
Use curly brackets {} to encapsulate instructions.
explanation: Para incluir instrucciones adicionales o directrices estrictas en una plantilla de prompt y asegurar que el modelo las distinga del resto del contenido, las mejores prácticas de Prompt Engineering recomiendan encapsularlas entre comillas triples (""").

question:
Universal Containers (UC) has a mature Salesforce org with a lot of data in cases and Knowledge articles. UC is concerned that there are many legacy fields, with data that might not be applicable for Einstein AI to draft accurate email responses.
Which solution should UC use to ensure Einstein AI can draft responses from a defined data source?
options: Service AI Grounding
Work Summaries
Service Replies
explanation: Service AI Grounding permite definir y limitar de qué fuentes de datos específicas (como campos concretos de Casos y Knowledge) extrae información la IA de Einstein para redactar respuestas, reduciendo el ruido de campos heredados o irrelevantes.

question: Which scenario best illustrates the use of Model Context Protocol (MCP) in an enterprise AI deployment?
options: A legal assistant agent using MCP to dynamically find a document classification API to analyze case files
A customer service agent engaging another agent in real-time conversation to resolve tickets
A sales agent discovering other agents' capabilities using Agent Cards
explanation: MCP se ilustra mejor con un agente que lo usa para descubrir y conectarse dinamicamente a herramientas y APIs externas, como una API de clasificacion de documentos. La opcion B describe A2A y la opcion C describe el uso de Agent Cards, que son parte del protocolo A2A para descubrimiento de capacidades entre agentes.

question: An Agentforce Specialist turned on Einstein Generative AI in Setup. Now, the Agentforce Specialist would like to create custom prompt templates in Prompt Builder. However, they cannot access Prompt Builder in the Setup menu. What is causing the problem?
options: The Prompt Template User permission set was not assigned correctly.
The Prompt Template Manager permission set was not assigned correctly.
The large language model (LLM) was not configured correctly in Data Cloud.
explanation: Para acceder a Prompt Builder en el menu de Setup y crear templates, se necesita el permission set Prompt Template Manager. Prompt Template User solo permite ejecutar templates existentes, no acceder al Setup de Prompt Builder para crearlos.

question: Universal Containers has a new AI project. What should an Agentforce Specialist consider when adding a related list on the Account object to be used in the prompt template?
options: After selecting a related list from the Account, use the field picker to choose merge fields in Prompt Builder.
Prompt Builder must be used to assign the fields from the related list as a JSON format.
The fields for the related list are based on the default page layout of the Account for the current user.
explanation: Al agregar una related list del objeto Account en un prompt template, los campos disponibles como merge fields estan basados en el page layout predeterminado del Account para el usuario actual. Si el campo no esta en el page layout, no aparecera como opcion de merge field en Prompt Builder.

question: An Agentforce Specialist needs to enable the use of Sales Email prompt templates for the sales team. The Agentforce Specialist has already created the templates in Prompt Builder. According to best practices, which steps should the Agentforce Specialist take to ensure the sales team can use these templates?
options: Assign the Prompt Template User permission set and enable Sales Emails in Setup.
Assign the Data Cloud Admin permission set and enable Sales Emails in Setup.
Assign the Prompt Template Manager permission set and enable Sales Emails in Setup.
explanation: Para que el equipo de ventas pueda utilizar las plantillas de prompts de correos de ventas creadas en Prompt Builder, deben tener los permisos adecuados para usarlas. Por ello, se debe asignar el conjunto de permisos 'Prompt Template User' (Usuario de plantilla de prompt). Además, es obligatorio activar la funcionalidad de 'Sales Emails' en la configuración de Salesforce para que los usuarios puedan generar correos mediante IA.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is setting up a new org and needs to ensure that users can create and execute prompt templates. The specialist is unsure which roles are necessary. Which permission sets should be assigned?
options: Prompt Template Manager for creating templates and Prompt Template User for executing templates.
Prompt Template Manager for creating templates and Data Cloud Admin for executing templates.
Data Cloud Admin for creating templates and Prompt Template User for executing templates.
explanation: Prompt Template Manager crea y administra plantillas; Prompt Template User permite ejecutar las plantillas. Asignar ambos es la práctica de permisos correcta para creación y ejecución.

question: Universal Containers wants to leverage the Record Snapshots grounding feature in a prompt template. What preparations are required?
options: Configure page layout of the master record type.
Create a field set for all the fields to be grounded.
Enable and configure dynamic form for the object.
explanation: Record Snapshots grounding relies on the fields visible on the master record type page layout, not field sets. Therefore, configuring the page layout is the required preparation.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to connect an Agentforce Service Agent to a Slack channel for employee use. Which step should an Agentforce Specialist take to connect the agent with a Slack channel?
options: Create a connection between Salesforce and the Slack workspace.
Create an Omni-Channel flow and connection between Salesforce and the Slack workspace.
Create an embedded service deployment and connection between Salesforce and the Slack workspace.
explanation: Para conectar un agente de Salesforce con un canal de Slack, el paso requerido es crear una conexion entre el workspace de Salesforce y el workspace de Slack. Esta conexion es el prerequisito para que el agente pueda interactuar con usuarios a traves de canales de Slack.

question: Universal Containers is building a digital shopping assistant that needs to dynamically generate product recommendations using information from the company's external product recommendation predictive model through APIs. Which Agentforce capability should make it easier for the agent to consume the external product recommendation tool?
options: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Hugging Face
Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol
explanation: Model Context Protocol (MCP) es la capacidad de Agentforce que permite al agente descubrir y consumir dinamicamente herramientas y APIs externas, como un modelo predictivo de recomendaciones de productos. MCP facilita la integracion con herramientas externas de forma estandarizada sin necesidad de codificacion custom.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to implement an Al-powered customer service agent that can  Retrieve proprietary policy documents that are stored as PDFs.  Ensure responses are grounded in approved company data, not generic LLM knowledge. What should UC do first?
options: Add the files to the content, and then select the data library option.
Expand the Al agent's scope to search all Salesforce records.
Set up an Agentforce Data Library for AI retrieval of policy documents.
explanation: Para fundamentar las respuestas del agente en documentos PDF no estructurados y evitar alucinaciones, el primer paso es establecer una fuente de datos estructurada. Esto implica configurar una Biblioteca de Datos (Data Library) o un índice de búsqueda vectorial en Data Cloud, lo que permite al agente recuperar y leer estos documentos durante su razonamiento.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is expanding its Agentforce for Service capabilities to include case management. For security purposes, UC wants the agent to verify a customer's identity before providing any case-related information. The verification must be deterministic ensuring that no case details are shared unless identity verification has been successfully completed. Which approach best meets this requirement?
options: Create a variable to store the verification status, set it as output from a "Verify Identity" action, and apply a filter so any case-related actions only run when the variable confirms verification.
Use keywords such as "Always" and "Never" to write clear logic in Topic Instructions to verify user identity before providing any case information.
Store the verification status in a custom variable and set a global instruction that the agent should check this variable before sharing case information.
explanation: Cuando se requiere un control determinista en Agentforce, la mejor práctica es utilizar variables e incorporarlas en la lógica de las acciones. Al almacenar el estado en una variable de salida tras una acción de 'Verificar Identidad' y aplicar un filtro en las acciones de gestión de casos, se asegura de forma técnica que las acciones no se ejecutarán a menos que la variable confirme el éxito de la verificación, superando las limitaciones de la interpretación del LLM en instrucciones textuales.

question: Universal Containers has multiple Salesforce orgs, each with a unique customer service agent where a verification agent must pass customer identity data to downstream agents handling account modifications. The customer ID must remain secure and persistent across agent handoffs without exposure to LLM modification. What is the most appropriate configuration?
options: Implement a custom object to temporarily store verification status and have each agent query it via SOQL actions during execution.
Store customer identity information in conversation variables created by the first agent and have other agents read those same conversation variables.
Use the Agent API to start the downstream agent's session and pass the verified customer ID as a read-only context variable, ensuring security and preventing LLM alteration.
explanation: Para transferir datos de identidad de forma segura entre agentes en distintos orgs, la solucion correcta es usar el Agent API para iniciar la sesion del agente downstream y pasar el customer ID verificado como una context variable de solo lectura. Esto garantiza seguridad, persistencia y previene que el LLM modifique datos criticos de identidad.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) plans to send one of three different emails to its customers based on the customer's lifetime value score and their market segment.
Considering that UC are required to explain why an e-mail was selected, which AI model should UC use to achieve this?
options: Predictive model and generative model
Generative model
Predictive model
explanation: Un modelo predictivo es el adecuado para seleccionar uno de tres emails basándose en el lifetime value y segmento de mercado, y puede explicar la razón de la selección mediante sus features de predicción. Un modelo generativo crea contenido nuevo pero no puede explicar fácilmente por qué seleccionó una opción entre varias predefinidas.

question: How is Data Cloud leveraged by the Answer Questions with Knowledge action in Agentforce?
options: Data Cloud stores and manages the indexed Knowledge articles.
Data Cloud is not required; the articles can be accessed directly from the CRM by the agent.
Data Cloud provides the real-time data streams that update the Knowledge articles.
explanation: Data Cloud se usa para almacenar y gestionar artículos de Knowledge indexados que el agente usa para respuestas fundamentadas; es el repositorio de contenido de Knowledge.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales team to use Al to suggest recommended products from its catalog.
Which type of prompt template should UC use?
options: Record summary prompt template
Email generation prompt template
Flex prompt template
explanation: Un Flex Template es el tipo correcto para sugerir productos recomendados ya que permite combinar datos de multiples objetos (catalogo de productos, historial del cliente) como inputs independientes para generar recomendaciones personalizadas.

question: Universal Containers (UC) configured a new PDF file ingestion in Data Cloud with all the required fields, and also created the mapping and the search index. UC is now setting up the retriever and notices a required field is missing. How should UC resolve this?
options: Update the search index to include the desired field.
Modify the retriever's configuration to include the desired field.
Create a new custom Data Cloud object that includes the desired field.
explanation: Para resolver un campo requerido faltante, actualice la search index para incluir el campo. El retriever depende de índices configurados; sin el campo indexado, no puede devolver datos necesarios.

question: What considerations should an Agentforce Specialist be aware of when using Record Snapshots grounding in a prompt template?
options: Activities such as tasks and events are excluded.
Email addresses associated with the object are excluded.
Empty data, such as fields without values or sections without limits, is filtered out.
explanation: Record Snapshots filtra datos vacíos y solo incluye campos con valores. Esto asegura que el grounding sea relevante y sin ruido para el modelo generativo.

question:
Universal Containers has an active standard email prompt template that does not fully deliver on the business requirements. 
Which steps should an AI Specialist take to use the content of the standard prompt email template in question and customize it to fully meet the business requirements?
options: Save as New Template and edit as needed.
Clone the existing template and modify as needed.
Save as New Version and edit as needed.
explanation: Las plantillas de prompt estándar son de solo lectura y no pueden clonarse directamente ni guardarse como una nueva versión. Para personalizarlas, se debe usar 'Guardar como nueva plantilla' (Save as New Template) para crear una copia editable.

question: Universal Containers has PDF maintenance guides in an external folder, not yet in Salesforce. The team wants a standard, clicks- only setup for the Service Agent to use these documents. Which approach should the Agentforce Specialist implement?
options: Paste external PDF links into topic instructions and rely on the model to follow them, avoiding configuration of a retrieval source, index, or retriever action.
Upload the PDFs as File source in the Agentforce Data Library which will build a Search Index, and create a retriever to ground responses from those documents.
Configure Data Cloud to ingest file attachments and create custom index and retriever for product record and attachment dat
explanation: La forma estándar y declarativa (sin código) de emplear documentos no estructurados en Agentforce es cargarlos como una fuente de archivos (File source) directamente en la Data Library de Agentforce. Esto generará automáticamente un índice de búsqueda. Posteriormente, se configura una acción de tipo 'retriever' para que el agente recupere el contexto y base (ground) sus respuestas en dicha documentación.

question: Leadership needs to populate a dynamic form field with a summary or description created by a large language model (LLM) to facilitate more productive conversations with customers. Leadership also wants to keep a human in the loop. Which prompt template type should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Field Generation
Record Summary
Sales Email
explanation: Field Generation prompt templates are designed exactly for populating a specific field. They include human-in-the-loop natively by requiring the user to click the sparkle icon on the dynamic form field to review and accept the generated text.

question: In addition to Recipient and Sender, which object should an Agentforce utilize for inserting merge fields into a Sales email template prompt?
options: Recipient Opportunities
Recipient Account
User Organization
explanation: Ademas de Recipient y Sender, el objeto Recipient Opportunities es el recurso adicional disponible para insertar merge fields en un Sales Email template, permitiendo incluir datos de oportunidades relacionadas con el destinatario para personalizar el email con informacion comercial relevante.

question: Universal Containers implements Custom Agent Actions to enhance its customer service operations. The development team needs to understand the core components of a Custom Agent Action to ensure proper configuration and functionality. Which component is essential for defining what the action returns?
options: Action Instructions.
Output Types.
Action Name.
explanation: Output Types es el componente esencial que define lo que la accion devuelve al agente. Sin una configuracion correcta de los Output Types, el agente no puede procesar ni utilizar los resultados de la accion personalizada.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is rolling out an AI-powered support assistant to help customer service agents quickly retrieve relevant troubleshooting steps and policy guidelines from a large document repository. The documents are updated frequently and belong to different product lines. How should UC configure the retrieval system to ensure agents receive accurate, up-to-date, and product-specific information?
options: Index all documents in a single Data Library without filters and let the LLM determine relevance.
Create a custom retriever in Einstein Studio, and apply filters for publication date and product line.
Use only keyword search in the retriever to ensure exact matches for product-specific queries.
explanation: Crear un retriever personalizado con filtros por fecha de publicacion y linea de producto garantiza que el agente recupere informacion actualizada y especifica del producto relevante. Esto mejora la precision de las respuestas frente a un indice unico sin filtros.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to make a marketing newsletter and to directly use data from five unrelated objects (two standard and three custom) ina prompt template. How should UC accomplish this?
options: Create a prompt template-triggered flow to access the data from five objects.
Create a prompt template passing in a special custom object.
Create a flex template and use the five objects as inputs.
explanation: Flex prompt templates allow you to define up to 5 distinct inputs (standard or custom objects), making it the most direct and appropriate way to incorporate data from five unrelated objects without requiring a custom Flow.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to leverage Generative AI Salesforce functionality to reduce Service Agent handling time by providing recommended replies based on the existing Knowledge articles. Which feature should UC implement?
options: Einstein Case Summaries.
Knowledge Replies.
Einstein Work Summaries.
explanation: Knowledge Replies proporciona respuestas recomendadas basadas en articulos de Knowledge existentes, reduciendo el tiempo que los agentes de servicio dedican a redactar respuestas a preguntas frecuentes.

question: Universal Containers wants to assign agents to improve department efficiency. Which configuration ensures the right tasks are handled by the right agents?
options: SDR Agent for lead qualification, Service Agent for support tickets, Employee Agent for HR requests
Sales Coach Agent for lead and service Agent for HR requests, and Support tickets to ensure cases are available
One Service Agent to efficiently handle each of these scenarios, which reduces the number of agent types needed for support
explanation: La especialización es la clave del rendimiento en Agentforce. Asignar el 'SDR Agent' para la calificación y gestión inicial de prospectos (leads), el 'Service Agent' para gestionar casos y soporte a clientes, y el 'Employee Agent' para atender requerimientos internos de recursos humanos y asistencia, garantiza que cada agente utilice las habilidades y contextos diseñados específicamente para su área operativa.

question: What is a key benefit of the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol?
options: Provides a standardized framework for cross-vendor agent discovery and communication
Allows auto-onboard third-party agents without additional contracts, trust scores, or shared identity controls
Provides a standardized runtime engine for internal agent discovery and communication
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) tiene como beneficio clave proporcionar un marco estandarizado que permite a los agentes de diferentes proveedores descubrirse y comunicarse entre sí de forma segura, facilitando la interoperabilidad entre distintos ecosistemas de IA.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is preparing to use the Agentforce Testing Center to ensure the reliability of a new agent. UC has a CSV file with test cases and is reviewing the documentation to understand best practices and limitations. Which best practice should the company follow to avoid modifying CRM data while running tests in the Testing Center?
options: Limit the number of test cases to 50 per test to minimize data changes.
Use the Testing Center only in the sandbox environment.
Run tests in the production environment to ensure real time data accuracy.
explanation: Para garantizar que las pruebas del agente no alteren ni corrompan los datos reales de los clientes (datos de producción de CRM), la mejor práctica y recomendación estricta de Salesforce es ejecutar el Testing Center exclusivamente en un entorno Sandbox. Esto permite evaluar acciones y flujos sin riesgo de impacto operativo real.

question: Universal Containers has seen a high adoption rate of a new feature that uses generative AI to populate a summary field of a custom object, Competitor Analysis. All sales users have the same profile but one user cannot see the generative AI-enabled field icon next to the summary field. What is the most likely cause of the issue?
options: The user does not have the field Generative AI User permission set assigned.
The prompt template associated with summary field is not activated for that user.
The user does not have the Prompt Template User permission set assigned.
explanation: To execute a prompt template and see the generative AI-enabled field icon, the user must be assigned the 'Prompt Template User' permission set.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to assess Salesforce's generative Al features but has concerns over its company data being exposed to third party large language models (LLMs). Specifically, UC wants the following capabilities to be part of Einstein's generative AI service.
- No data is used for LLM training or product improvements by third-party LLMs.
- No data is retained outside of UC's Salesforce org.
- The data sent cannot be accessed by the LLM provider.
Which property of the Einstein Trust Layer should the AI Specialist highlight to UC that addresses these requirements?
options: Prompt Defense
Zero-Data Retention Policy
Data Masking
explanation: La Política de Retención Cero de Datos (Zero-Data Retention Policy) es un acuerdo contractual con proveedores de LLM de terceros (como OpenAI o Anthropic) que garantiza que no almacenan ni utilizan los datos de los clientes de Salesforce (prompts o respuestas) para el entrenamiento de modelos o registros (logging).

question: What is the primary function of the planner service in the Agent system?
options: Generating record queries based on conversation history
Offering real-time language translation during conversations
Identifying copilot actions to respond to user utterances
explanation: La funcion principal del planner service es identificar las acciones del copilot/agente mas apropiadas para responder a las utterances del usuario. Analiza la solicitud, selecciona el topic correcto y determina que acciones ejecutar y en que orden.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is implementing Einstein Generative AI to improve customer insights and interactions. UC needs audit and feedback data to be accessible for reporting purposes.
What is a consideration for this requirement?
options: Storing this data requires Data Cloud to be provisioned.
Storing this data requires a custom object for data to be configured.
Storing this data requires Salesforce big objects.
explanation: Para almacenar los datos de auditoría y de feedback generados por la Einstein Trust Layer (Audit Trail), es un requisito necesario que Data Cloud esté aprovisionado en la organización.

question: Universal Containers wants to systematically validate agent responses before deployment using a scalable testing process. Which Testing Center approach should the company implement?
options: Upload a structured CSV test template and run batch test cases in Testing Center.
Manually interact with the agent in Builder until responses seem correct.
Use pilot users in production to flag incorrect responses post-launch.
explanation: Cargar una plantilla CSV estructurada y ejecutar casos de prueba en lote en el Testing Center es el enfoque mas escalable y sistematico para validar respuestas del agente antes del despliegue. Permite probar cientos de utterances de forma automatica y repetible sin consumir Einstein Requests.

question: Universal Containers wants to automatically populate the Description field on the Account object with AI-generated content. Which prompt template type should be used?
options: Sales Email
Flex
Field Generation
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo de template correcto para poblar automaticamente un campo especifico (Description) en un objeto (Account) con contenido generado por IA. Esta disenado exactamente para este caso de uso: generar contenido para campos individuales de registros de Salesforce.

question: An Agentforce Specialist wants to troubleshoot their Agent's performance. Where should the Agentforce Specialist go to access all user interactions with the Agent, including Agent errors, incorrectly triggered actions, and incomplete plans?
options: Event Logs
Agent Settings
Plan Canvas
explanation: Event Logs es la herramienta correcta para revisar detalles de ejecucion del agente y hacer troubleshooting de su rendimiento. Proporciona informacion detallada sobre las interacciones, errores y el comportamiento del agente durante la ejecucion.

question: Universal Containers recently added a custom flow for processing returns and created a new Agent Action. Which action should the company take to ensure the Agentforce Service Agent can run this new flow as part of the new Agent Action?
options: Assign the Manage Users permission to the Agentforce Agent user.
Assign the Run Flows permission to the Agentforce Agent user.
Recreate the flow using the Agentforce Agent user.
explanation: Asignar Run Flows al Agentforce user es esencial para ejecutar flujos desde un Agent Action. Sin este permiso, la acción falla en ejecución.

question: Universal Containers tests out a new Einstein Generative AI feature for its sales team to create personalized and contextualized emails for its customers. Sometimes, users find that the draft email contains placeholders for attributes that could have been derived from the recipient's contact record. What is the most likely explanation for why the draft email shows these placeholders?
options: The user does not have Einstein Sales Emails permission assigned.
The user does not have permission to access the fields.
The user's locale language is not supported by Prompt Builder.
explanation: Uso de marcadores de posición indica que el usuario no tiene acceso a los campos.

question: A support team handles a high volume of chat interactions and needs a solution to provide quick, relevant responses to customer inquiries. Responses must be grounded in the organization's knowledge base. Which feature should the support team use?
options: Einstein Knowledge Recommendations
Einstein Service Replies
Einstein Reply Recommendations
explanation: Einstein Service Replies es la función de respuesta IA para chats de servicio, basada en Knowledge. Permite respuestas rápidas y alineadas con la base de conocimiento de la empresa.

question: Sales reps at Universal Containers should not be able to create or edit prompt templates. Which permission set should an Agentforce Specialist assign to the sales reps?
options: Prompt Execute User
Prompt Template Manager
Prompt Template User
explanation: Prompt Template User permite unicamente ejecutar prompt templates existentes, sin capacidad de crear ni editar. Es el permission set correcto para usuarios que solo necesitan usar los templates, no gestionarlos. Prompt Execute User no es un permission set estandar de Salesforce.

question: An Agentforce Specialist needs to create a prompt template to fill a custom field named Latest Opportunities Summary on the Account object with information from the three most recently opened opportunities. How should the Agentforce Specialist gather the necessary data for the prompt template?
options: Select the Account Opportunity object as a resource when creating the prompt template.
Create a flow to retrieve the opportunity information.
Use formula fields to reference the Einstein related list of opportunities.
explanation: A Template-Triggered Prompt Flow should be created to explicitly fetch, sort by opened date, and limit the opportunities to the three most recent ones. This provides the granular querying needed, which is not natively supported by simply selecting the related list resource.

question: Amid their busy schedules, sales reps at Universal Containers dedicate time to follow up with prospects and existing clients via email regarding renewals or new deals. They spend many hours reviewing past communications and details about their customers before performing outreach. Which standard Agent action helps draft personalized emails to prospects by generating text based on previous successful communications?
options: Agent Action: Draft or Revise Sales Email
Agent Action: Find Similar Opportunities
Agent Action: Summarize Record
explanation: Draft or Revise Sales Email genera emails personalizados de comunicaciones previas.

question:
An AI Specialist is considering using a Fleld Generation prompt template type.
What should the AI Specialist check before creating the Field Generation prompt to ensure it is possible for the field to be enabled for generative AI?
options: That the field chosen must be a rich text field with 255 characters or more
That the org is set to API version 59 or higher
That the Lightning page layout where the field will reside has been upgraded to Dynamic Forms
explanation: Antes de crear un Field Generation prompt, la página Lightning donde residirá el campo debe estar actualizada a Dynamic Forms, que es el requisito previo para habilitar generación de campo con IA. El campo no necesita ser de texto enriquecido ni se requiere una versión específica de API para este propósito.

question:
When configuring a prompt template, an AI Specialist previews the results of the prompt template they've written. They see two distinct text outputs: Resolution and Response.
Which information does the Resolution text provide?
options: It shows the full text that is sent to the Trust Layer.
It shows the response from the LLM based on the sample record.
It shows which sensitive data is masked before it is sent to the LLM.
explanation: The new answer is correct because the 'Resolution' text in Prompt Builder shows the fully resolved prompt text (including merged data) that is sent to the LLM via the Trust Layer. The original answer was incorrect because the 'Response' section, not the 'Resolution', shows the LLM's generated response.

question: An Agentforce Specialist wants to troubleshoot an agent that is hallucinating weblinks. The agent has an action that uses a prompt template, which is using a knowledge retriever, to generate the output text. Which process is appropriate to find the root cause of the hallucination behavior?
options: Examine the topic name and classification description for hallucination guardrails.
Examine the prompt instructions and contents of the chunks shown in the resolved prompt output.
Examine the topic instructions and ensure the word 'ALWAYS' is used in the hallucination guardrails.
explanation: Para encontrar la causa raiz de alucinaciones de weblinks, se deben examinar las instrucciones del prompt y el contenido de los chunks mostrados en el output del prompt resuelto. Los chunks revelan que datos exactos se estan usando para grounding, lo que permite identificar si el contenido fuente contiene links incorrectos o si el LLM los esta inventando.

question: In a Knowledge-based data library configuration, what is the primary difference between the identifying fields and the content fields?
options: Identifying fields are mandatory, while content fields are optional.
Identifying fields store metadata, while content fields store the full article text.
Identifying fields help locate the correct Knowledge article, while content fields enrich AI responses with detailed information.
explanation: Los identifying fields ayudan a localizar el articulo de Knowledge correcto durante la busqueda, mientras que los content fields enriquecen las respuestas de la IA con informacion detallada del articulo. Esta distincion es clave para configurar correctamente una Data Library basada en Knowledge.

question: Universal Containers' service team wants to customize the standard case summary response from Agentforce. What should the Agentforce Specialist do to achieve this?
options: Customize the standard Record Summary template for the Case object.
Summarize the Case with a standard agent action.
Create a custom Record Summary prompt template for the Case object.
explanation: La opción correcta es crear un 'Record Summary prompt template' personalizado para el objeto Caso. Las acciones de resumen estándar no se pueden editar directamente, por lo que se debe usar Prompt Builder para adaptar la salida de la IA a los requerimientos del equipo.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has effectively utilized prompt templates to update summary fields on Lightning record pages. Ant admin now wishes to incorporate similar functionality into UC's automation processes using Flow. How should the admin get a response from this prompt template from within a flow to use as part of UC's automation?
options: Invocable Apex
Einstein for Flow
Flow action
explanation: En Salesforce Flow, las plantillas de prompt (Prompt Templates) se integran y consumen utilizando el elemento estándar 'Action' (Acción de flujo). Las plantillas activas de Prompt Builder se exponen automáticamente a la plataforma como acciones invocables, facilitando la inserción de variables de entrada y el guardado del resultado generado en la lógica de las automatizaciones de la empresa de manera declarativa.

question: When using a prompt template, what should an Agentforce Specialist consider with their grounding data and chosen model?
options: Review the token limit in the Einstein Trust Layer.
Ensure queries used for grounding employ offset so the token limits of models are not exceeded.
Review the model limitation in Prompt Builder versus the grounding data size.
explanation: The original answer incorrectly suggested using 'offset' to manage token limits, which is not how Prompt Builder handles grounding data size. The correct approach is to review the model limitations (token limits) within Prompt Builder versus the grounding data size, ensuring the total context does not exceed the chosen model's capacity.

question: What is a key benefit of the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol?
options: Provides a standardized framework for cross-vendor agent discovery and communication
Allows auto-onboard third-party agents without additional contracts, trust scores, or shared identity controls
Provides a standardized runtime engine for internal agent discovery and communication
explanation: The original answer incorrectly claimed the A2A protocol is for 'internal' agent discovery. The correct answer is that the key benefit of the A2A protocol is providing a standardized framework for 'cross-vendor' agent discovery and communication, allowing Salesforce agents to collaborate seamlessly with third-party external agents.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to build an Agentforce Service Agent that provides the latest, active, and relevant policy and compliance information to customers. The agent must: ● Semantically search HR policies, compliance guidelines, and company procedures ● Ensure responses are grounded on published Knowledge ● Allow Knowledge updates to be reflected immediately without manual reconfiguration What should UC do to ensure the agent retrieves the right information?
options: Set up an Agentforce Data Library to store and index policy documents for AI retrieval.
Enable the agent to search all internal records and past customer inquiries.
Manually add policy responses into the AI model to prevent hallucinations.
explanation: Crear una Data Library indexada permite búsquedas semánticas y grounding de políticas y contenido. Esto asegura que las respuestas sean precisas y actualizadas.

question: Universal Containers wants to implement a customer verification process where sensitive account information can only be accessed after the customer passes identity verification. The agent must enforce this security rule deterministically without allowing the LLM to bypass the verification requirement. What should an Agentforce Specialist recommend as the best solution?
options: Use context variables to store verification status in the messaging session and configure the agent to check these variables through natural language prompts during each sensitive action.
Include detailed verification instructions in the agent's topic instructions explaining when customers should be verified and rely on the LLM to follow these guidelines consistently.

Create a custom variable IsCustomerVerified set by a verification action, then apply a conditional filter using the expression IsCustomerVerified equals true to all sensitive data actions, ensuring deterministic access control that the LLM can't alter.
explanation: Para control de acceso deterministico que el LLM no pueda alterar, se debe crear una variable personalizada IsCustomerVerified y aplicar filtros condicionales en todas las acciones sensibles. Depender del LLM para seguir instrucciones no es deterministico; los filtros condicionales en acciones son la unica garantia real.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is looking to enhance its operational efficiency. UC has recently adopted Salesforce and is considering implementing Einstein Agentforce or copilot  to improve its processes. 
What is a key reason for implementing Einstein Agentforce or copilot ?
options: Allowing AI to perform tasks without user interaction
Streamlining workflows and automating repetitive tasks
explanation: La principal razón para implementar Einstein Agentforce es optimizar los flujos de trabajo y automatizar tareas repetitivas mediante asistencia de IA conversacional y acciones automáticas, aumentando la productividad de los empleados.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has registered an external service in Salesforce. UC wants to use the response from the external service as a merge field in a prompt template. Which element in the template-triggered prompt flow should UC use to make this data available as a merge field?
options: Use External Service Record merge fields.
Convert the JSON to an XML merge field.
Use the 'Add Prompt Instructions' flow element.
explanation: Para utilizar datos provenientes de un servicio externo dentro de un template-triggered prompt flow, se debe invocar la acción del servicio externo y luego utilizar el elemento de flujo específico llamado Add Prompt Instructions. Este elemento es el encargado de tomar los resultados del flujo e incrustarlos como instrucciones o contexto disponible dentro de la plantilla del prompt.

question: Universal Containers has grounded a prompt template with a related list. During user acceptance testing (UAT), users are not getting the correct responses. What is the most likely cause?
options: The related list is not configured in Data Cloud.
The related list is not on the parent object's page layout.
The related list merge field is not supported in this type of prompt template.
explanation: La causa mas probable es que la related list no este en el page layout del objeto padre. Para que los merge fields de related lists funcionen correctamente en un prompt template, la related list debe estar visible en el page layout del registro que se usa como contexto.

question:
The AI Specialist of Northern Trail Outfitters reviewed the organization's data masking settings within the Configure Data Masking menu within Setup. Upon assessing all of the fields, a few additional fields were deemed sensitive and have been masked within Einstein's Trust Layer.
Which steps should the AI Specialist take upon modifying the masked fields?
options: Turn off the Einstein Trust Layer and turn it on again.
Test and confirm that the responses generated from prompts that utilize the data and masked data do not adversely affect the quality of the generated response
Turn on Einstein Feedback so that end users can report if there are any negative side effects on AI features.
explanation: Después de modificar los campos enmascarados, se deben probar los prompts que utilizan esos datos para confirmar que el enmascaramiento no afecta negativamente la calidad de las respuestas generadas. Reiniciar el Trust Layer no tiene efecto y habilitar Einstein Feedback no valida directamente el impacto del enmascaramiento.

question: An Agentforce Specialist created a Field Generation prompt template. What should the Agentforce Specialist do to expose the template to the user?
options: Use a screen flow to associate the Field Generation prompt template.
Associate the template with the form field on the Lightning page.
Call a template using an autolaunched flow.
explanation: Para exponer un Field Generation prompt template al usuario, se debe asociar el template con el campo especifico en la Lightning page. Esto hace que aparezca el icono sparkle junto al campo, permitiendo al usuario generar contenido con IA directamente desde el registro.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to improve the efficiency of addressing customer questions and reduce agent handling time with AI generated responses. The agents should be able to leverage their existing knowledge base and identify whether the responses are coming from the large language model (LLM) or from Salesforce Knowledge.
Which step should UC take to meet this requirement?
options: Turn on Service AI Grounding, Grounding with Case, and Service Replies.
Turn on Service Replies, Service AI Grounding, and Grounding with Knowledge.
Turn on Service AI Grounding and Grounding with Knowledge.
explanation: Para habilitar respuestas de IA basadas en Knowledge con visibilidad sobre el origen (LLM vs Knowledge), se debe activar Service Replies, Service AI Grounding y Grounding with Knowledge juntos. Grounding with Case no es el mecanismo para identificar respuestas de Knowledge, y solo Service AI Grounding no activa las respuestas sugeridas.

question: An administrator wants to check the response of the Flex prompt template they've built, but the preview button is greyed out. What is the reason for this?
options: The prompt has not been saved and activated.
The records related to the prompt have not been selected.
A merge field has not been inserted in the prompt.
explanation: In Prompt Builder, the preview button remains greyed out until the administrator selects the specific records related to the prompt to evaluate the merge fields and generate the preview.
